title: thelypteris rustica
intro: Thelypteris rustica, also known as the Rustic Thelypteris or Rusty-shouldered Fern, is a species of fern native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Thelypteris rustica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris rustica often involve infusions or decoctions made from the plant's leaves, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically as a poultice.
